name: Skittershank's Clawpack
inspire: After an Action step, if an enemy leader ({icon:leader}) is slain or has 3 or more damage tokens, Inspire each friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Marked for Death
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after making an Attack roll for a friendly fighter if the target is an enemy leader ({icon:leader}).
reactions.flavorText: Those claw-marked by the Clans Eshin are not long for the world.
reactions.rulesText: Re-roll 1 Attack dice in that Attack roll.

reactions.name: Spiketraps and Snares
reactions.trigger:
Immediately after a friendly fighter's successful melee Attack, give the target a barb token.

Immediately after an enemy fighter with any barb tokens Moves, inflict 1 damage on that fighter, then remove that fighter's barb tokens. Remove all barb tokens from enemy fighters at the end of the battle round.
reactions.flavorText: Skittershank and his minions know all sorts of ways to bleed and harry their target.
reactions.rulesText:
Immediately after a friendly fighter's successful melee Attack, give the target a barb token.

Immediately after an enemy fighter with any barb tokens Moves, inflict 1 damage on that fighter, then remove that fighter's barb tokens. Remove all barb tokens from enemy fighters at the end of the battle round.

abilities.name: Smoke Bombs
abilities.flavorText: In a burst of glimmering green smoke, the Clawpack blinds their enemies.
abilities.rulesText: Immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack, give each enemy fighter adjacent to the attacker a Stagger token. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: The Jaws Snap
abilities.flavorText: Luring targets from their place of safety is standard practice for any true assassin.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick an enemy leader ({icon:leader}) in enemy territory. Push that fighter 1 hex. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Skittering Blur
abilities.flavorText: When the lure and the blind fails, pure speed can buy another chance...
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. In the next turn, friendly assassins ({icon:minion}) cannot be picked to be the target of Attacks or Ploys. You can only use this ability once per game.
